product: Recover a deleted Lakebase project within 7 days
tagline: When you delete a Lakebase project, it now enters a soft deleted state for 7 days before permanent deletion.
what_it_does: When you delete a Lakebase project, it now enters a soft deleted state for 7 days before permanent deletion. You can recover the project during that window, restoring all branches, databases, endpoints, and project settings. A project is the top level container for your Lakebase resources, including branches, computes, databases, and roles.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: When you delete a Lakebase project, it now enters a soft deleted state for 7 days before permanent deletion. You can recover the project during that window, restoring all branches, databases, endpoints, and project settings.
key_takeaway: When you delete a Lakebase project, it now enters a soft deleted state for 7 days before permanent deletion.
